features.title: Presentation Design
features.description: Excellent slide templates, Magic Design, speaker notes, and easy sharing.

features.title: Social Graphics
features.description: Thousands of ready-sized templates for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, ads, and posts.

features.title: Brand Kits
features.description: Stores logos, colors, fonts, and reusable assets for consistent campaigns.

features.title: AI Image Tools
features.description: Magic Media, background removal, and AI editing help create visual concepts quickly.

features.title: Team Collaboration
features.description: Comments, approvals, folders, and shared templates support multi-person workflows.

testimonials.quote: We generated a week of ad concepts in one afternoon and finally had enough variants to test.
testimonials.author: Maya Chen

testimonials.quote: The brand kit workflow keeps every export consistent, even when clients ask for changes fast.
testimonials.author: Jordan Lee

testimonials.quote: It is the fastest way I have found to create clean ad mockups for new offers.
testimonials.author: Sam Rivera

faq.question: What is Canva best for?
faq.answer: Canva is best for ad testing and fast creative production.

faq.question: How much does Canva cost?
faq.answer: Review the current Canva pricing page because plan names, limits, and promotions can change.

faq.question: Is Canva good for teams?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva can work for teams when its collaboration, governance, and pricing fit the workflow.

faq.question: What are the main Canva limitations?
faq.answer: The main limitations are reflected in the cons section and should be weighed against your use case.

faq.question: How does Canva compare with alternatives?
faq.answer: Canva should be compared on pricing, core features, ease of use, integrations, and support.

faq.question: Does Canva have a free plan?
faq.answer: Check the official Canva site for current free-plan availability and usage limits.

faq.question: Who should avoid Canva?
faq.answer: Skip Canva if the not-for section describes your needs better than the best-for section.

faq.question: How long does Canva take to set up?
faq.answer: Most readers can evaluate Canva quickly, but full rollout depends on team size and integrations.

faq.question: Can beginners use Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, beginners can start with the basics and expand into advanced workflows over time.

faq.question: What should I check before buying Canva?
faq.answer: Confirm pricing, required features, integrations, data policies, and support expectations before buying.

faq.question: Is Canva worth it in 2026?
faq.answer: Canva is worth shortlisting when its documented strengths, pricing, and limitations match your workflow.

faq.question: Where can I try Canva?
faq.answer: Use the review button or official website to try Canva directly.

socialProof.label: Users represented
socialProof.description: Position your product with crowd-friendly proof for Pinterest visitors who skim before clicking.

socialProof.label: Creative formats
socialProof.description: Canva supports Presentation Design, Social Graphics, Brand Kits workflows for its target users.

socialProof.label: First campaign draft
socialProof.description: Most teams can move from prompt to export-ready creative concepts quickly.

comparison.product: Generates many ad concepts in minutes
comparison.competitors: Manual design tools often require more setup

comparison.product: Includes AI scoring to prioritize ideas
comparison.competitors: Many tools focus on design only
Traditional editors may offer deeper pixel control

comparison.product: Rapid paid-social testing and campaign iteration
comparison.competitors: One-off graphics or highly custom brand systems

whyTrust.title: Affiliate disclosure first
whyTrust.description: Buttons may earn a commission, but the review includes both benefits and limitations so readers can decide confidently.

whyTrust.title: Conversion-focused criteria
whyTrust.description: The page evaluates speed, ease of use, pricing clarity, output quality, and practical fit for common marketing workflows.

whyTrust.title: Easy to update
whyTrust.description: All claims live in JSON so you can refresh pricing, screenshots, FAQs, and affiliate links without rewriting code.

notFor.title: Pixel-perfect designers
notFor.description: If you need complete manual control over every layer, a traditional design suite may be a better fit.

notFor.title: No ad testing budget
notFor.description: The biggest value appears when you can test multiple creatives across paid or organic channels.

notFor.title: Set-and-forget users
notFor.description: AI drafts still benefit from human review, brand checks, and performance-based iteration.

summary: Canva is a browser-based design suite for creating social posts, presentations, videos, brand kits, and marketing visuals without starting from a blank canvas.
idealUsers: Small businesses that need polished brand assets
strengths: Strong AI-assisted design and copy tools
weaknesses: Less precise than professional desktop design tools
Template-heavy work can look familiar without customization
Advanced asset management requires paid team plans
